_note: Refreshed by the refresh-sports-feed scheduled task. Each item is {headline, url, source, published (ISO8601), snark}. Snark voice: Barstool-adjacent guy-at-the-bar, crass, horny, cocky, zero filler. One sentence. No slurs, no punching down at specific real people in a harmful way. Punch sideways (at media, front offices, rival fanbases) and up (at ownership). Keep it Boston.

items.headline: Red Sox Minor Lines: Kyson Witherspoon goes five scoreless
items.snark: Finally a Sox pitcher who can locate the zone, shame he's in Single-A and not Fenway.

items.headline: Red Sox vs. Orioles preview: Connelly Early takes mound in series opener
items.snark: Early has seven scoreless last time out, so naturally the bats will score two runs total.

items.headline: Monday Morning Brushback: Breslow's leash
items.snark: How long before ownership asks if the guy calling the shots is actually good at his job?

items.headline: Jarren Duran went 7-2 in games he went deep in May, 6-12 when he didn't
items.snark: One guy carrying the offense like Atlas if Atlas had to do it in last place.

items.headline: Red Sox See AL East Foes Rise In Power Rankings
items.snark: 11.5 games back and watching everyone else rise like a guy stuck on the dock watching boats leave.

items.headline: Are Red Sox better off now than when they hired Craig Breslow as CBO?
items.snark: Spoiler: the answer is not a clear and obvious yes, which tells you everything.

items.headline: Patriots and Eagles reportedly compromised to reach A.J. Brown deal
items.snark: Both teams met in the middle, Philly splits cap hit and Pats mortgage the future, everybody wins.

items.headline: Mike Vrabel presser scheduled for Tuesday 11:30 AM
items.snark: Vrabel addressing the A.J. Brown trade and probably dodging every Christian Gonzalez holdout question.

items.headline: Patriots officially acquire A.J. Brown via trade with Eagles
items.snark: Vrabel finally gets his guy after standing up and walking out of the Titans draft room in 2022.

items.headline: Patriots place TE Julian Hill on IR after trading for A.J. Brown
items.snark: Tight end's 2026 season over before it started, at least the WR room got an upgrade.

items.headline: How A.J. Brown trade changes the Patriots wide receiver group
items.snark: Maye gets a real WR1 after losing Diggs, defense finally has to cover someone besides Gesicki.

items.headline: What trading for A.J. Brown means for the Patriots
items.snark: 2028 first-rounder and $113M for a 29-year-old, Vrabel betting big on the Super Bowl window.
